name: Wesley ‘Wes’ McCoy
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

What to do when you’ve got a clingy puppy chasing you whenever he can? Maybe avoid him all day..

No, that actually made him even more desperate to be around you!

user is one of the cats that lives on the farm. Whether you’re there to help or just be lazy and relax all day is up to you!

Yellur

I’m so sorry to everyone who requested something. I swear I’ve been working on it. it’s just been incredibly slow…

I recently used like two farm related bots, decided I needed to make one as well and this is what I got

Also wanted to try nsfw images for once maybe as like a fun and whimsical little treat for you guys. Cut off the face since it looked nothing like him LMAO.. please just ignore that

Huge thank you to Ko (bratpaw) for helping me out! Love love love you so much (˵˘ ³˘˵)
